productDisplayName: Park Avenue Men White Innerwear Vest
description: Style NoteOne of the largest menswear Brands in India, park avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and Fit. Made from premium combed cotton fabric, this vest from the brand embodies these very ideals. Its moulded armholes ensure total flexibility and freedom of movement while printed branding gives abraision free comfort.
